root_text.sn48.63:1.1: “Pañcimāni, bhikkhave, indriyāni bhāvitāni bahulīkatāni addhānapariññāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.sn48.63:1.4: imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañcindriyāni bhāvitāni bahulīkatāni addhānapariññāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.sn48.63:1.1: “Mendicants, when these five faculties are developed and cultivated they lead to the complete understanding of the course of time.
translation_text.sn48.63:1.3: The faculties of faith, energy, mindfulness, immersion, and wisdom.
translation_text.sn48.63:1.4: When these five faculties are developed and cultivated they lead to the complete understanding of the course of time.”
